news.title_en: A Small AI Company Just Took the Stage at One of the Biggest Events in Computing, and It Points to Where Drug Discovery Is Headed
news.title_zh: A Small AI Company Just Took the Stage at One of the Biggest Events in Computing, and It Points to Where Drug Discovery Is Headed
news.summary_en: American News Group News Commentary - The race to bring artificial intelligence into drug discovery has become one of the most closely watched stories in both biotech and technology. Pharmaceutical companies are pouring money into AI, chipmakers are courting the life-sciences market, and a wave of specialized companies is trying to prove that machine reasoning can actually speed the search for new medicines. This week, one of the smaller names in that race stepped onto a very large stage.

news.title_en: Tech Mahindra and Cisco Partner to Bring AI-Driven Security Service Edge to Global Enterprises
news.title_zh: Tech Mahindra and Cisco Partner to Bring AI-Driven Security Service Edge to Global Enterprises
news.summary_en: Tech Mahindra (NSE: TECHM), a leading global provider of technology consulting and digital solutions to enterprises across industries, announced a partnership with Cisco to deliver an AI-driven Security Service Edge (SSE) offering for global enterprises. The joint offering will help enterprises reduce security complexity, improve visibility and control, deliver seamless user access, and strengthen resilience as they scale cloud, hybrid work, and AI adoption.

news.title_en: Verizon Stock Rises After Earnings as Turnaround Plan Gathers Pace
news.title_zh: Verizon Stock Rises After Earnings as Turnaround Plan Gathers Pace
news.summary_en: Verizon  stock was rising on Friday after the wireless carrier reported better-than-expected earnings and raised its guidance, signaling to investors that CEO Dan Schulman’s overhaul is starting to pay off.  Verizon reported second-quarter adjusted earnings of $1.30 a share, as revenue slipped 0.7% from a year ago to $34.3 billion.  The telecommunications company also raised its full-year guidance.
